description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with an olive green polymer body and a prominent detachable box magazine in a brownish hue. The rifle features a long, black barrel with a metallic muzzle device at the tip, and a large, mounted optical scope on top for precision aiming. The trigger and pistol grip are integrated into the forward section of the stock, characteristic of bullpup designs, which shortens the overall length while maintaining a full-length barrel. The magazine is positioned behind the grip, and the rifle's body appears robust and angular, with minimal external embellishments. The surface finish is matte, reducing glare and enhancing tactical utility. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern bullpup rifle with an olive green polymer body, black barrel, mounted scope, and brown detachable magazine. The design is compact, angular, and tactical with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green body, black barrel, mounted scope, and brown magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, scope alignment, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
